company_context: Automate IT & Secure Every Endpoint | Automox New: Turnkey Results Endpoint management, with built-in certainty Turnkey Results removes the uncertainty that holds endpoint automation back. It delivers a personalized Results Blueprint that ensures Automox is configured and operated to achieve real outcomes from day one. No guesswork. No trial and error. Just clarity – with a proven path forward, validated across millions of devices managed by Automox. Get a demo What is Turnkey Results? Why Automox? Automox unifies automation, visibility, and security to keep every device ready, compliant, and secure – across Windows, macOS, and Linux. Automate 96% more patches, increase security efficiency by 44%, and see a 362% ROI in four months. Certainty to move fast 94% of organizations haven’t fully automated endpoint management ¹ – slowing response, increasing exposure, and draining valuable time. Automox transforms friction into flow, driving speed, control, and certainty across your environment. Built for the Era of Autonomy IT isn’t about keeping up. It’s about setting the pace. Automox helps you automate , adapt , and act with clarity , so you can respond instantly, enforce policy at scale, and prove outcomes with confidence. From config to compliance, Automox moves you from reactive IT to proactive autonomous endpoint management. Every endpoint. Everywhere. All at once. Automox runs anywhere work happens – across laptops, servers, and cloud environments – all through a lightweight, always-connected agent. No VPNs. No on-prem servers. No lag between insight and action. Automate without limits Create, customize, and deploy automations at scale with Automox Worklets™. Remediate vulnerabilities, configure systems, and enforce policies. Or, build your own workflows from the Worklet Catalog, featuring 360+ scripts vetted by Automox. Proven results. Hundreds of hours saved. Automox customers save hundreds of hours each month and run 74% more efficient patching and security operations.² ¹ State of Endpoint Management 2026 ² IDC Business Value of Automox Patch and Endpoint Management Software, January 2025 Overall User Rating See all reviews “ Great time-saving and effortless product. Constantly improving and providing great support. ” - Director Of Information Technology in the Transportation Industry Faster fixes. Stronger IT. See Automox in action — no commitment. Start a free trial Schedule a 1:1 demo

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, I'm Alex from DeepData AI. I came across Automox and was impressed with the work you're doing in endpoint management. I'd like to introduce our data processing solution that can help you gain more insights from your data.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, thanks for reaching out, Alex. We're always looking for ways to improve our operations. But I have to say, our plate is pretty full right now with our Turnkey Results initiative. What makes you think your solution is a good fit for us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your priorities, and I appreciate the work you're doing with Turnkey Results. Our solution can actually complement your efforts by providing more detailed analytics on your endpoint management. We've seen our customers achieve significant efficiency gains and cost savings. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure if we're ready to take on another project right now. We're still in the process of rolling out Turnkey Results, and I'm not sure if our team has the bandwidth to integrate another solution. Plus, I'm not familiar with DeepData AI - how do you compare to other data processing solutions like Tableau or Power BI?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a fair question. While Tableau and Power BI are great tools, our solution is more tailored to the specific needs of IT operations like yours. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I think we could provide more customized support. As for integration, our solution is designed to be lightweight and easy to deploy. We've had customers up and running in a matter of weeks.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I see. Well, I'm still not convinced that this is the right time for us. And to be honest, I'm a bit concerned about the cost. We've been quoted some pretty high prices for data processing solutions in the past, and I'm not sure if our budget can accommodate it. What kind of pricing are we talking about?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is tiered based on the size of the organization and the scope of the project. For a company like yours, we're looking at around $50,000 per year, with discounts available for multi-year commitments.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your honesty, Alex, but I think that's a bit out of our budget. We're trying to prioritize our spending right now, and I just don't think we can justify that kind of expense. I appreciate the introduction to DeepData AI, but I think we're going to have to pass on this opportunity.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the buyer's budget concerns and potentially offered more flexible pricing options or a pilot project to reduce the upfront cost. Sentiment: Neutral
